name: MAST P60 Premium 3in1 permanent makeup set
shortDescription: Complete permanent makeup set: MAST P60 machine with adjustable stroke length, spare battery, and RCA adapter. Everything you need in a single package.
description:
The MAST P60 3in1 set is the perfect starter package for permanent makeup artists. The package includes the popular MAST P60 wireless permanent makeup machine with adjustable stroke length, a spare battery for uninterrupted work, and an RCA adapter that enables use with traditional wired power supplies.

The MAST P60 features a 5-level adjustable stroke length (2.2–3.2 mm), which is rare among permanent makeup machines. The quiet coreless motor, ergonomic design, and mere 121-gram weight ensure comfortable and precise work.

With the spare battery, you get virtually unlimited operating time: while you work with one, the other charges. The RCA adapter provides flexibility – wireless or wired, you decide.
metaTitle: MAST P60 3in1 permanent makeup set – machine + spare battery + RCA adapter
metaDescription: Complete MAST P60 set: permanent makeup machine with adjustable stroke length, spare battery, RCA adapter. Professional starter package for 119.990 Ft.

featureRows.headline: Why is the 3in1 set worth it?
featureRows.subtitle: Everything you need for professional work in one package

features.title: Spare battery – uninterrupted work
features.description: The second battery included in the set ensures you never have to interrupt work for charging. While you work with one, the other charges. This is especially important on busy days when clients come one after another.

features.title: RCA adapter – two modes of use
features.description: The RCA adapter enables using the MAST P60 with a traditional wired power supply as well. This can be useful for extra assurance during longer treatments, or if you want to use your existing power supply.

features.title: 5-level adjustable stroke length
features.description: With 5 different stroke lengths (2.2 / 2.5 / 2.7 / 2.9 / 3.2 mm), the MAST P60 is suitable for virtually every permanent makeup technique: hair-stroke eyebrows, ombré, lip pigmentation, eyeliner. One machine for every task.

features.title: Ultra-light, quiet, and ergonomic
features.description: At only 121 grams and with its quiet coreless motor, the MAST P60 is one of the most comfortable permanent makeup machines on the market. The ergonomic grip enables precise work even during all-day treatment sessions.

training.headline: Permanent makeup device operator training
training.intro: Professional permanent makeup device operator training is available for the MAST P60 set, provided within an officially registered adult education program.
items: MAST P60 operating principles, stroke length adjustment, and RCA adapter use
Eyebrow permanent makeup: hair-strokes, shading, ombré technique
Lip pigmentation: contour, aquarelle, full fill
Eyeliner techniques: thin and thicker line work
Skin types and appropriate stroke length selection
Hygiene protocols and sterile work practices
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn treatment techniques in a real-world setting.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate confirming competence for the professional operation of the device.
If you are interested in the training opportunity, please contact us through any of our channels to schedule an appointment!

testimonials.name: K. Boglárka
testimonials.text: The 3in1 set was my best decision! <mark>The spare battery has saved me a few times when clients came one after another</mark>. I also use the RCA adapter when there's a very long treatment. The price difference from the basic machine is well worth it.

expertQuote.quote: The 3in1 set is the best choice if you want to use the P60 professionally. The spare battery and RCA adapter provide a safety net that's worth the investment.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What's the difference between the standard P60 and the 3in1 set?
faq.answer: The 3in1 set includes the MAST P60 machine, a spare battery, and an RCA adapter. The standard P60 only includes the machine and the default battery. The set therefore provides double operating time and two modes of use (wireless + wired).

faq.question: What is the RCA adapter for?
faq.answer: The RCA adapter enables using the MAST P60 with a traditional wired power supply. This is useful when you need unlimited operating time during a longer treatment, or if you want to use your existing power supply.

faq.question: What techniques is the MAST P60 suitable for?
faq.answer: Thanks to the 5-level adjustable stroke length, it is suitable for virtually every permanent makeup technique: hair-stroke eyebrows, shaded/ombré eyebrows, lip pigmentation, eyeliner. Shorter stroke length for sensitive areas, longer for more intensive pigmentation.

faq.question: How long does it take to charge both batteries?
faq.answer: Both batteries can be charged via the Type-C connector. While you work with one, you can charge the other, allowing you to work practically without interruption all day.

faq.question: What needle cartridges is it compatible with?
faq.answer: The MAST P60 uses a universal cartridge system. It works excellently with MAST Oceanheart and WJX needle cartridges, which are also available in our webshop.

faq.question: What training is available for the set?
faq.answer: A one-day intensive permanent makeup device operator course is available for the set within adult education. The training is free with device purchase, and we issue an official certificate upon completion.

faq.question: What warranty applies to the set?
faq.answer: The MAST P60 3in1 set comes with a 1-year warranty. We provide a replacement device during repairs.
